mapper.insert: INSERT INTO settlement_request_header ( id, doc_no, company, store, settlement_type, customer_code, supplier_code, supplier_contract, total_amount, currency, status, created_by, reference_no, remark, ready_for_billing_at, billed_at, settled_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{docNo}, #{company}, #{store}, #{settlementType}, #{customerCode}, #{supplierCode}, #{supplierContract}, #{totalAmount}, #{currency}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{referenceNo}, #{remark}, #{readyForBillingAt}, #{billedAt}, #{settledAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT id, doc_no, company, store, settlement_type, customer_code, supplier_code, supplier_contract, total_amount, currency, status, created_by, reference_no, remark, ready_for_billing_at, billed_at, settled_at, created_at, updated_at FROM settlement_request_header WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, doc_no, company, store, settlement_type, customer_code, supplier_code, supplier_contract, total_amount, currency, status, created_by, reference_no, remark, ready_for_billing_at, billed_at, settled_at, created_at, updated_at FROM settlement_request_header ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, doc_no, company, store, settlement_type, customer_code, supplier_code, supplier_contract, total_amount, currency, status, created_by, reference_no, remark, ready_for_billing_at, billed_at, settled_at, created_at, updated_at FROM settlement_request_header WHERE (#{company} IS NULL OR company = #{company}) AND (#{store} IS NULL OR store = #{store}) AND (#{settlementType} IS NULL OR settlement_type = #{settlementType}) AND (#{customerCode} IS NULL OR customer_code = #{customerCode}) AND (#{supplierCode} IS NULL OR supplier_code = #{supplierCode}) AND (#{status} IS NULL OR status = #{status}) AND (#{createdBy} IS NULL OR created_by = #{createdBy}) ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, settlement_id, document_type, document_no, item_code, qty, uom, unit_price, line_amount, remark, created_at FROM settlement_request_detail WHERE settlement_id = #{settlementId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE settlement_request_header SET total_amount = #{totalAmount}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE settlement_request_header SET status = #{status}, ready_for_billing_at = COALESCE(#{readyForBillingAt}, ready_for_billing_at), billed_at = COALESCE(#{billedAt}, billed_at), settled_at = COALESCE(#{settledAt}, settled_at), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
